news.headline: Express Kitchen Hoods, LLC expands services in the Mid-Atlantic region, serving customers in Maryland after 20 years of experience.
news.summary: Rockville, Maryland - On January 3, 2025, Express Kitchen Hoods, LLC, a top provider in commercial kitchen ventilation and fire safety, shared news about their increased services in the Mid-Atlantic area. Boasting more than two decades of expertise, the company has extended their offerings to customers in Maryland and beyond.

news.headline: US sanctions Chinese Cybersec firm for aiding Flax Typhoon in 2022-23 breach, penalties imposed on the company.
news.summary: Penalties were imposed on a company by an agency for their involvement in supporting the Chinese hacking group Flax Typhoon during a hacking incident in 2022-23.

news.headline: Nokia Corporation buys back own shares on March 1, 2025.
Vortex Companies marks 10th anniversary as leader in trenchless infrastructure, planning year-long celebration.
news.summary: In honor of a decade of achievements and unwavering customer backing, Vortex Companies, LLC (Vortex) has announced a year-long commemoration for its 10th anniversary in 2025. The company, known worldwide for its expertise in trenchless infrastructure restoration, is preparing to mark this milestone with various events and activities.

(NYSE: CVNA). The probe follows claims of the company furnishing potentially deceptive business details to investors. If individuals have information or have been affected...

US controls more than 40% of worldwide Bitcoin hashrate, sparking debate on its dominance in mining.
news.summary: The ongoing discussion about hashrate dominance in Bitcoin mining persists due to the anonymous and dispersed geographical locations of miners.

news.headline: Mike Johnson reelected House Speaker with 218-215 margin.
Cryptocurrency market surges, Bitcoin nears $100,000, Dogecoin up by 11.4%, Ethereum up by 4.7%. Crypto trades and ETF inflows rising significantly.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets are on the rise on Friday, with Bitcoin nearing $100,000 despite record ETF outflows. Some notable prices are Bitcoin at $98,729.85 (+1.5%), Ethereum at $3,623.43 (+4.7%), Solana at $216.94 (+4.8%), XRP at $2.47 (+3.3%), Dogecoin at $0.3771 (+11.4%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00002406 (+5.3%). Significant statistics include a 20.3% increase in large transaction volume and a 97.9% rise in exchanges netflows. There were 77,289 traders liquidated in 24 hours (totaling $217.22 million), and over 48,000 BTC ($4.5 billion) withdrawn from exchanges in the past week. Bitcoin spot ETFs witnessed total net inflows of $4.63 billion in December, surpassing the monthly average for 2024. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US Treasury Dept slaps sanctions on Chinese tech firm for aiding Flax Typhoon in 2022-23 cyber attack.
news.summary: A company has been fined by the agency for allegedly aiding the Chinese hacking group Flax Typhoon in a cyber breach during the 2022-2023 period. The penalties imposed on the company are related to its alleged support for the hacking group during the infiltration.

news.headline: Trust Stamp CEO announces reverse split to be effective on Jan 6, 2025, after process initiated on Sept 20, 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta, GA, Jan. 03, 2025 - Gareth N. Genner, the CEO of Trust Stamp, revealed that the company's reverse split will take effect on January 6, 2025. The initiation of the reverse split procedure was commenced on September 20, 2024, with notification to Nasdaq. Subsequently, on November 4, 2024, Nasdaq granted an official extension for Trust Stamp to meet the $1 closing bid rule as part of the plan.

news.headline: Household Cleaning Products Market to grow by USD 17.81 billion from 2024 to 2029, with 5% CAGR - Technavio.
news.summary: According to a report by Technavio, the global market for household cleaning products is projected to increase by USD 17.81 billion between 2025 and 2029. It is expected to register a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 5% during this period. The report offers a detailed analysis of the market trends and factors driving this growth.

news.headline: Genomic testing in healthcare highlighted in ADLM's Clinical Chemistry journal, transforming medicine in 2025.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, it was reported that genomic testing, which was previously believed to be a long-term objective, has become a prevalent tool in clinical settings, significantly influencing the field of medicine. The Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM), previously known as AACC, highlighted this development in a special issue. The use of genomic testing has steadily evolved and is now playing a crucial role in shaping medical practices.

news.headline: Global corporate e-learning market set to increase by $131.01 billion from 2025-2029, with a 12.7% CAGR; AI plays a significant role.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, it was reported that the impact of AI on the market is being reshaped. The corporate e-learning sector is projected to increase significantly, with an estimated growth of USD 131.01 billion from 2025 to 2029, as per Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.7% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Pamela Landwirth steps down as President and CEO of Give Kids The World, as former Darden Restaurants exec Jordan Lomas becomes interim CEO.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made in Orlando, Florida on January 3, 2025, it was revealed that Pamela Landwirth will be stepping down from her position as President and CEO of Give Kids The World (GTKW). The non-profit organization will see a change in leadership as former Darden Restaurants executive Jordan Lomas steps in as the interim CEO. This transition marks a significant change for the organization, which aims to fulfill the wishes of critically ill children and their families. This news comes as Landwirth concludes her tenure with GTKW, passing the baton to Lomas to lead the organization forward.

news.headline: Global industrial lighting market to grow by USD 2.83 billion from 2025 to 2029, with 48% of growth from APAC. CAGR of 5.7%.
news.summary: According to Technavio, the global industrial lighting market is projected to increase by approximately USD 2.83 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth is expected to occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.7% during this period. For more detailed forecasts and historical data, please refer to the comprehensive report.

news.headline: Realty ONE Group expands to Bonaire and Curacao, becoming countries 23 and 24 to join, on Jan 3, 2025.
news.summary: Two island nations recently became the 23rd and 24th countries to join the United Nations via a brokerage in Laguna Niguel, California. On January 3, 2025, Realty ONE Group International, a rapidly expanding franchisor and contemporary lifestyle brand, announced the inclusion of these two Caribbean islands in their network.

news.headline: GID-Windsor Communities receives honors at Multi-Housing News' 2024 Excellence Awards with $30 billion in assets under management.
news.summary: Atlanta, as of January 3, 2025, GID, a real estate investment management firm headquartered in the US, has assets under management totaling more than $30 billion. Windsor Communities, its wholly-owned property management company, has received two notable accolades.

news.headline: Global API market to grow by USD 97.6B in 2025-2029, fueled by AI-driven insights, boosting revenue and CAGR of 7.1% - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of artificial intelligence on market evolution. According to Technavio, the global active pharmaceutical ingredients market is projected to expand by a substantial USD 97.6 billion between 2025 and 2029. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) exceeding 7.1% during the forecast period. The influence of AI in revolutionizing various industries, including pharmaceuticals, is clearly evident in this upward trajectory.

news.headline: VBI Vaccines finalizes sale to K2 after creditor protection; concludes CCAA proceedings.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, in Cambridge, Massachusetts, VBI Vaccines Inc. disclosed that, while undergoing creditor protection processes under the Companies' Creditors Arrangement Act in Canada, it has confirmed its sale and investment plans. This update comes as part of the Company's ongoing actions amidst financial challenges.

news.headline: Endoscopic closure devices market to surge by USD 825.7 million (2025-2029), boosted by 8% CAGR, due to rising gastrointestinal diseases and AI influence.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market evolution, specifically focusing on the global endoscopic closure devices market. By 2029, the market is projected to increase by approximately USD 825.7 million, with a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 8% from 2025.

news.headline: Sarah Donley appointed as Executive Vice President and Chief Operations & Risk Officer at First Community, replacing Tanya Butts who served since 2016.
news.summary: In Lexington, South Carolina on January 3, 2025, Sarah Donley was appointed as the Executive Vice President and Chief Operations & Risk Officer at First Community. She takes over from Tanya Butts, who held the position since 2016. Ms. Donley began her tenure at First Community...

news.headline: Chubb Limited's Q4 earnings call set for Jan 29, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern after market close.
news.summary: Chubb Limited, listed on NYSE as CB, is set to conduct its Q4 earnings conference call on January 29, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. ET. The company plans to release its Q4 earnings report and financial supplement post-market closure on the same day.

news.headline: Global education apps market to increase by USD 6.08 billion from 2025-2029, with 14.5% CAGR growth driven by government initiatives and AI, reports Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report examining the influence of artificial intelligence on market dynamics has projected a significant increase in the global education apps market. It is estimated that the market size will expand by USD 6.08 billion between 2025 and 2029. The forecast indicates a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 14.5% during this period. This growth is attributed to the escalating demand for educational technologies integrated with AI capabilities.

news.headline: FDA issued notice on Jan 3, 2025, stating determination on 35 food contact notifications (FCNs).
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland, on January 3, 2025, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration released a digest highlighting updates across the agency. A recent notice in the Federal Register announced the FDA's decision concerning 35 food contact notifications (FCNs).

news.headline: INLIF LIMITED completes IPO with US$8M from 2M ordinary shares at US$4 each, listed on Nasdaq as INLF.
news.summary: In Quanzhou, China, on January 3, 2025, INLIF LIMITED (Nasdaq: INLF) disclosed the completion of its initial public offering (the “Offering”) comprising 2,000,000 ordinary shares sold at a public offering price of US$4.00 per share. INLIF is involved in the research, development, manufacturing, and sales of manipulator arms dedicated to injection molding machines. Commencing January 2, 2025, the ordinary shares have been listed on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the trading symbol “INLF.”

news.headline: Johnson secures votes to retain House Speaker position.
Dogecoin surges by 12% to $0.381, outperforming rivals. Analysts predict potential 234% gain if it hits $1.20.
news.summary: In the current trading session, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has seen a significant surge, with its price climbing by 12% to reach $0.381. This notable increase has excited crypto analysts, who are now making bullish forecasts for the popular meme coin. Dogecoin has outperformed its competitors in the meme coin market, with Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) rising by 5.8% to $0.00002421, and Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE) also increasing by the same percentage to reach $0.00002161.Crypto trader Javon Marks is optimistic about Dogecoin's momentum, setting an initial target price of $0.6533, which represents a potential 75% increase from its current value. Marks further suggests that if DOGE manages to surpass this level, there is a possibility for the rally to continue towards $1.20 or even higher, indicating a potential gain of 234%. Trader Tardigrade has indicated that DOGE might have hit a localized low and could be gearing up for new highs. Meanwhile, technical analyst Kevin highlighted the robustness of the cryptocurrency in the market.The wider crypto market has shown positivity as well, with Bitcoin climbing back above $98,000, showcasing overall bullish sentiment.

news.headline: XRP price close to breaking bullish pattern with potential to reach $5, doubling its current value.
news.summary: The current price of XRP is close to breaking a pattern that could lead to a 100% bullish outcome. If successful, this could push the value of XRP up to $5.

news.headline: NPCC's Winter Reliability Assessment: Adequate electricity supplies forecasted for northeast region, coincident peak demand of 112,065 MW on Jan 26, 2025.
news.summary: In New York, the Northeast Power Coordinating Council (NPCC) released its annual winter reliability assessment, predicting that the region will have enough electricity to meet projected peak demand this winter. The forecasted regional coincident peak demand is expected to reach 112,065 MW, with this peak demand anticipated to happen during the week of January 26, 2025. The assessment indicates that the region will have approximately 150 mega-watts more than needed to meet the peak demand under various weather scenarios.

news.headline: Brent crude futures settle at $76.51/bbl, up 58 cents, 0.76%.
Dogecoin's price surged due to potential payments integration on social media platform X after Elon Musk acquired it for $44B in 2022.
news.summary: The value of Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has surged in the last 24 hours, potentially fueled by the nearing launch of payment options on social media platform X by 2025. After being purchased by Elon Musk for a significant $44 billion in 2022, Twitter was rebranded as platform X. Musk initially started acquiring shares in January 2022 and confirmed his acquisition plans in April 2022, finalizing the deal in October 2022. As the new owner, Musk aims to develop an all-encompassing app merging social media, payment features, videos, and more. The integration of payment services on platform X has long been anticipated, contributing to multiple spikes in Dogecoin value. Musk's consistent advocacy for Dogecoin has strengthened the belief in its potential. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trump-backed Mike Johnson wins trhe vote to remain House speaker.
Bionano sets $10M registered direct offering under Nasdaq rules, priced at-the-market.
news.summary: A recent study revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased by 2% in the last quarter, reaching a total of 7.8%. This rise is primarily due to the ongoing economic challenges faced by businesses during the pandemic. The research also found that the number of job vacancies has decreased by 15% compared to the same period last year. Furthermore, it highlighted that the average salary has dropped by 5% in the past six months. Experts warn that unless significant measures are taken to stimulate job creation and support businesses, the situation is likely to worsen in the coming months.

NYMEX WTI Crude February futures settle at $73.96 a barrel, up 83 cents, 1.13%.
Two US House Republicans switch votes to support Mike Johnson for speaker, tipping vote count in his favor.
NYMEX Gasoline February futures settle at $2.0537 a gallon.
NYMEX Diesel February futures settle at $2.3478 a gallon.
Despite initial setback, Johnson likely to win as speaker according to bettors.
Expect increased stress in 2025, according to Apollo Global Management's Grewal.
Future generations may require $5 million+ for retirement from 2100 onwards.
Alset Inc. closes $1.5 million direct offering for 1.5M shares at $1.00 each on NASDAQ under market rules.
news.summary: On January 3, 2025, Bethesda-based Alset Inc. (NASDAQ: AEI) finalized a registered direct offering under Nasdaq rules. The offering consisted of 1,500,000 shares of common stock priced at $1.00 per share. Alset Inc. is a multifaceted company involved in EHome communities, real estate, financial services, digital transformation technologies, biohealth activities, and consumer products. The company operates in the United States, Singapore, Hong Kong, and South Korea.

news.headline: Silicon Valley and first responders team up on GUNSENS, AI tech to detect gun threats, debuts at CES 2025 in Las Vegas.
news.summary: Debuting at CES 2025 in Las Vegas from January 7-10, the innovative autonomous threat detection system known as GUNSENS aims to enhance safety by swiftly identifying potential gun violence incidents. This groundbreaking technology is set to impress attendees with its cutting-edge features.

news.headline: SOL surpasses $200 as Aave deposits reach record $33.4B amid rising investor optimism for Trump inauguration.
news.summary: The upcoming inauguration of President Trump has sparked increased investor confidence, leading to a surge in market capital inflow. This trend has propelled Aave deposits to reach record-breaking levels, reflecting growing optimism among investors.

news.headline: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc. to release Q4 preliminary earnings on Jan 21, 2025, with conference call on Jan 22, 2025 at 2:00 p.m. CT.
news.summary: Great Southern Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Great Southern Bank, headquartered in Springfield, Missouri, is set to announce its fourth-quarter preliminary earnings on January 21, 2025, after the market closes. The company, listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol GSBC, will hold a conference call on January 22, 2025, at 2:00 p.m. Central Time (3:00 p.m. Eastern Time) to discuss these financial results. This update was shared through a press release on Jan. 03, 2025.

news.headline: Bitcoin mining is more challenging now, 16 years after Satoshi Nakamoto mined its genesis block.
news.summary: 16 years ago today, the mysterious entity known as Satoshi Nakamoto mined the genesis block of Bitcoin. Since then, the process of mining the cryptocurrency has become increasingly challenging. Satoshi Nakamoto's action marked the beginning of a new era in digital currency, which is now more popular than ever. Today, Bitcoin mining requires advanced technology and expertise due to the high level of difficulty involved.

news.headline: Vinyl records market to surge by $857.2M (2025-2029), driven by aesthetic appeal. AI-powered growth report by Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of AI on market evolution. The global vinyl records market is projected to increase by approximately USD 857.2 million between 2025 and 2029, as forecasted by Technavio. This growth translates to a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.3% throughout the specified period.
